category.scope_note: Air-source heat pump compliance comparison for space heating and domestic hot water applications in Finland.

title.en: China-to-Finland Air-source Heat Pump Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入芬兰：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入芬蘭：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China air-source heat pump documentation against Finland/EU CE marking, Ecodesign Regulation (EU) 2016/2281, F-gas Regulation (EU) 2024/573, Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU, and related Finnish safety and EMC requirements enforced by Tukes (Finnish Safety and Chemicals Agency) and SFS (Finnish Standards Association).
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国空气源热泵文件与芬兰/欧盟CE标志、生态设计法规（EU）2016/2281、氟化气体法规（EU）2024/573、压力设备指令2014/68/EU，以及由芬兰安全和化工局（Tukes）和芬兰标准协会（SFS）执行的相关芬兰安全与EMC要求的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國空氣源熱泵文件與芬蘭/歐盟CE標誌、生態設計法規（EU）2016/2281、氟化氣體法規（EU）2024/573、壓力設備指令2014/68/EU，以及由芬蘭安全和化工局（Tukes）和芬蘭標準協會（SFS）執行的相關芬蘭安全與EMC要求的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, refrigerant-handling guidance, pressure-system design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and installers should verify current Finnish and EU law, harmonised standards, F-gas licensing requirements, pressure equipment categories, and destination-country installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、制冷剂处理指导、压力系统设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行芬兰及欧盟法律、协调标准、氟化气体许可要求、压力设备类别及目的国安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、製冷劑處理指導、壓力系統設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行芬蘭及歐盟法律、協調標準、氟化氣體許可要求、壓力設備類別及目的國安裝規則。

answer_first.en: CE marking under LVD and EMC Directive, Ecodesign seasonal efficiency (ηs ≥ 125% with EN 14825 cold-climate test points at -15°C/-22°C), F-gas GWP caps and Tukes-recognized technician qualification, Pressure Equipment Directive classification, and EPREL energy label registration are the major Finland compliance gaps for Chinese air-source heat pumps.
answer_first.zh: 依据低压指令和EMC指令取得CE标志、生态设计季节能效（ηs ≥ 125%，含EN 14825寒冷气候测试点-15°C/-22°C）、氟化气体GWP上限及Tukes认可的技术人员资质、压力设备指令分类，以及EPREL能效标签注册，是中国空气源热泵进入芬兰市场的主要合规差距。
answer_first.zht: 依據低壓指令和EMC指令取得CE標誌、生態設計季節能效（ηs ≥ 125%，含EN 14825寒冷氣候測試點-15°C/-22°C）、氟化氣體GWP上限及Tukes認可的技術人員資質、壓力設備指令分類，以及EPREL能效標籤注冊，是中國空氣源熱泵進入芬蘭市場的主要合規差距。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
